description.value:
Humans granted ability to assume seal form for single day by sídhe. Accepted pact to serve sídhe as agents and shore defenders. Can pass gift to children. Bound by geas preventing harm to sea birds or seals.

Category: Folklore Monster

HP: — | DB: — | Build: — | Move: —

Armor: None

Special Abilities

  • Shapeshift between human and seal form
  • Cannot be far from sea - sicken and weaken more than day's travel away
  • –1D10 CON per day away from sea beyond first day
  • Learn few spells compelling animal obedience (Call Fish, Control Weather)
  • Natural talent for swimming
  • Geas - must not harm sea birds or seals: breaking causes 2 penalty dice to all rolls and 1 POW loss per 10 minutes until 0 (death)
  • Can sense Mythos creatures 50% of time within 100 yards
  • Compulsion to attack Mythos creatures - resisted by POW check
  • Sídhe-touched - spells affecting/blocking sídhe magic work on selkies
  • Typically fishermen by trade
  • Solitary by nature but bound to community
  • Feel out of place among humans, seek solitary lives if no family geas
  • +1 bonus die to Sanity checks vs. creatures they're compelled to attack
